channel.title: GitHub HLSL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of HLSL in GitHub

item.title: crosire/reshade-shaders
item.description: A collection of post-processing shaders written for ReShade.

item.title: notpeelz/reshade-xhair
item.description: A customizable, fullscreen-compatible crosshair overlay for ReShade

item.title: JamesCJ60/Universal-x86-Tuning-Utility
item.description: Unlock the full potential of your Intel/AMD based device.

item.title: Mortalitas/GShade
item.description: GShade is a highly modified ReShade fork & utility package with numerous improvements and settings autodetection for over 300 games.
